title: Prepare v0.5.27 release

sources.reason: Current release metadata and evidence contract.
Documented PR-first release and distribution contract.
Previous release Work Item establishes the release preparation evidence pattern.

riskAssessment.reason: Release metadata, installer default, and generated evidence must stay bound to one exact release preparation tree.

executionDecision.reason: The next patch release and exact release evidence scope are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: The release tag, installer default, release.json digests, and source identity must all agree on v0.5.27.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: release metadata and installer default point to the same next patch tag
generated evidence digests match the release preparation tree
release, smoke, and compatibility workflows remain unchanged

acceptance: release.json declares v0.5.27 and its supply-chain digests are regenerated by command.
install.sh defaults and usage text resolve v0.5.27 without changing installer behavior.
Focused release and supply-chain tests plus make quality pass; existing release, smoke, and compatibility workflows remain unchanged.
The exact release preparation commit is pushed through a PR, merged to main, and the Work Item is archived.
guidelines: Do not hand-edit generated SBOM, provenance, or release digest artifacts.
Preserve the current main release workflow and PR-first exact-SHA lifecycle.
Keep release tag, installer reference, source identity, and digests explicit and consistent.

intent.problem: The repository has merged the v0.5.26 release and needs the next patch release prepared through the established exact-SHA PR-first workflow.
constraints: Use v0.5.27 as the next patch version.
Do not modify release, smoke, or compatibility workflow definitions.
Regenerate generated evidence through the supply-chain command and merge through a PR before cleanup.
intent.rationale: A small release-preparation diff keeps the public installer, release metadata, and evidence chain aligned while preserving the immutable v0.5.26 release.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested the same release preparation, PR merge, and branch cleanup workflow.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
